chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 644 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 2767/26 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 16.03.2026 Syed Nouman Zahid Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG along with Syed Jamil Ahmad, Assistant Direcotr (Legal Affairs) DRAP, Karachi. ----------- A Report has been submitted by the DRAP. Paragraph 5 of which reads as follows:- “5. That in compliance of the Honourable Court Orders in Suit No. 644 of 2026 dated 24.02.2026, the application (singjoint) of the M/s Cortex SMC private limited, Karachi is evaluated and placed in the agenda of the upcoming Meeting of the Medical Device Board to be held in the next week. The decision of the Medical Device Board will be communicated to the petitioner accordingly.” In view thereof, it appears that the purpose of this Petition has essentially been served. The same stands disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
